name: Dreaming
profile: Dreaming was founded in 1993 by Thomas Becker (drums), Thomas Schulz (bass, voc) and Sandro Uhlmann (guitar, voc). They played their first Gig in February 1994 together with Mirror of Deception and Dawn of Winter. In the same year they recorded six songs and published it as demo called "Smirten Prøben". In 1999 the first Full-length "Tý Volœý" came out as a self-made release on CD and Vinyl. The second one, just called "II" was published in 2006 as CD on PsycheDOOMelic Records and as Vinyl on The Skull Records.
